creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
the print/ghostscript9 port fails to build for me. Please see:

http://meatwad.mouf.net/tb/errors/10-CURRENT-amd64-FreeBSD-swillspkg/ghostscript9-9.06_1.log

or freefall:/home/swills/ghostscript9-9.06_1.log

for the full log, but the tail end looks like:

if [ x != x ]; then LD_RUN_PATH=; export LD_RUN_PATH; fi; \
XCFLAGS= XINCLUDE= XLDFLAGS= XLIBDIRS= XLIBS= \
FEATURE_DEVS= DEVICE_DEVS= DEVICE_DEVS1= DEVICE_DEVS2= DEVICE_DEVS3= \
DEVICE_DEVS4= DEVICE_DEVS5= DEVICE_DEVS6= DEVICE_DEVS7= DEVICE_DEVS8= \
DEVICE_DEVS9= DEVICE_DEVS10= DEVICE_DEVS11= DEVICE_DEVS12= \
DEVICE_DEVS13= DEVICE_DEVS14= DEVICE_DEVS15= DEVICE_DEVS16= \
DEVICE_DEVS17= DEVICE_DEVS18= DEVICE_DEVS19= DEVICE_DEVS20= \
DEVICE_DEVS_EXTRA= \
/bin/sh <./soobj/ldt.tr

cc: file: No such file or directory

gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/work/a/ports/print/ghostscript9/work/ghostscript-9.06'
gmake[1]: *** [so-subtarget] Error 2

gmake: *** [so] Error 2
*** [do-build] Error code 1

Stop in /a/ports/print/ghostscript9.

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: Try to build in tinderbox
